title: "First Solo Millionaires With Zero Daily Work Are Being Built Right Now (And You're Missing It)"
preview_text:
that era starts this year
and you're still manually responding to every DM thinking "this is how you build authentic connections"
let me show you the full automation wave that's already starting

title: How to become Successful (while Unemployed)
preview_text:
The post-employment era is here.
The biggest myth is that “hard work” or “being educated” pays, it doesn’t. Hard work is the fastest path to mediocrity. You’re better off doing as little as possible
